evidence: The Funniest movie next to its original!!!! Could not stop laughing!
Classic Din Knotts humor with a spooky twist.
You won’t ever see it coming because You’re Next! Loved this Movie!!

Tom Hanks and the late (rip) Carrie Fisher are amazing in this movie!
Tyler Perry is amazing at story telling!

Watching the movie is so funny!
Grew up watching these guys! Thanks for all the amazing memories!

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and family-oriented films, often enjoying light-hearted and humorous content. They appreciate fast-paced narratives that evoke nostalgia and emotional resonance, while showing less concern for production quality and brand loyalty.
